ONE real addition: Tromsø IL–FC Hradec Králové (Europa League 2QR leg 1, tonight 17:00 UTC, Romssa Arena, Tromsø). A genuine recall gap — a Norwegian club's European qualifier tonight, absent from the board even though the 21 July run's own RSSSF list named 'Tromsø (EL)'. Streaming VG TV (free, via Nordlys/Amedia 'viser begge kampene') + Viaplay (EL rights in Norway through 2031) — NOT TV 2 Play. confidence high.

CODE BUGS / REVERT-WAR FLAGGED (not durably fixable by research via the events.json array): (A) Tromsø EL streaming (VG TV/Viaplay) will be re-clobbered to 'TV 2 Play' every pipeline build because norwegianRights (scripts/lib/norwegian-rights.js line 83) maps /champions|europa|conference/ → TV 2 Play. CORRECT rights: Champions League (incl. qualifying) = TV 2 Play through 2026/27; Europa League + Conference League (incl. qualifying) = VIAPLAY through 2031 (+ VG TV/Amedia free stream for Norwegian clubs' HOME qualifiers). FIX for self-repair: split line 83 so /champions/ (ideally \bchampions league\b) → TV 2 Play while /europa|conference/ → Viaplay. Verify runs 05:30Z tomorrow (AFTER tonight's match), so the Tromsø channel is correct only until the next build — the self-repair fix is the durable solution; verify should also confirm+protect the channel (verificationStatus) as it did for Brann's Conference match. (B) docs/data/tv-listings.json has Tromsø's match CORRUPTED from the tvkampen scrape: 'Tromsø vs FC Viktoria Plzen' at 18:00 (wrong opponent — it is Hradec Králové; wrong time — 19:00). Harmless for TIME (build-events does not use tv-listings for time) and matchListing requires BOTH teams to match (wrong awayTeam → no streaming match, falls to rights map), but a source-quirks candidate. The broadcaster list in that row (VG TV/Viaplay/Eurosport/MAX) is otherwise correct.
